title: lasthenia aurea
intro: Lasthenia aurea, also known as Golden-rayed tarplant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments, including skin issues and respiratory problems. The plant has been found to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations and reducing inflammation. Golden-rayed tarplant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
